**THE NETHERLANDS**
A total of 7 surveys have been sent out to the ado-
lescent and adult twins. The seventh survey was
mailed out in 2004/2005 to all twins and their family
members. Participants in special projects, or subjects
whose new address had recently been recovered, are
still approached with the request to complete this
